channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [Mistral] ipex-llm
item.description:
📈 Rank: #10 → #9 (↑1)
Accelerate local LLM inference and finetuning (LLaMA, Mistral, ChatGLM, Qwen, DeepSeek, Mixtral, Gemma, Phi, MiniCPM, Qwen-VL, MiniCPM-V, etc.) on Intel XPU (e.g., local PC with iGPU and NPU, discrete GPU such as Arc, Flex and Max); seamlessly integrate with llama.cpp, Ollama, HuggingFace, LangChain, LlamaIndex, vLLM, DeepSpeed, Axolotl, etc.
Language: Python
Category: Mistral Stars: 8,729 | Forks: 1,407

item.title: [Mistral] inference
item.description:
📈 Rank: #9 → #8 (↑1)
Swap GPT for any LLM by changing a single line of code. Xinference lets you run open-source, speech, and multimodal models on cloud, on-prem, or your laptop — all through one unified, production-ready inference API.
Language: Python
Category: Mistral Stars: 9,131 | Forks: 805

item.title: [Mistral] mistral-inference
item.description:
📈 Rank: #8 → #7 (↑1)
Official inference library for Mistral models
Language: Jupyter Notebook
Category: Mistral Stars: 10,708 | Forks: 1,026

item.title: [Mistral] ludwig
item.description:
📈 Rank: #7 → #6 (↑1)
Low-code framework for building custom LLMs, neural networks, and other AI models
Language: Python
Category: Mistral Stars: 11,656 | Forks: 1,212

item.title: [Mistral] OpenLLM
item.description:
📈 Rank: #6 → #5 (↑1)
Run any open-source LLMs, such as DeepSeek and Llama, as OpenAI compatible API endpoint in the cloud.
Language: Python
Category: Mistral Stars: 12,165 | Forks: 803

item.title: [Mistral] khoj
item.description:
📈 Rank: #5 → #4 (↑1)
Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs. Build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. Turn any online or local LLM into your personal, autonomous AI (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). Get started - free.
Language: Python
Category: Mistral Stars: 33,398 | Forks: 2,062

item.title: [Mistral] LibreChat
item.description:
📈 Rank: #4 → #3 (↑1)
Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features Agents, MCP, DeepSeek, Anthropic, AWS, OpenAI, Responses API, Azure, Groq, o1, GPT-5, Mistral, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, Artifacts, AI model switching, message search, Code Interpreter, langchain, DALL-E-3, OpenAPI Actions, Functions, Secure Multi-User Auth, Presets, open-source for self-hosting. Active.
Language: TypeScript
Category: Mistral Stars: 34,647 | Forks: 7,007

item.title: [Mistral] awesome-LLM-resources
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #10 in Mistral
🧑‍🚀 全世界最好的LLM资料总结（多模态生成、Agent、辅助编程、AI审稿、数据处理、模型训练、模型推理、o1 模型、MCP、小语言模型、视觉语言模型） | Summary of the world's best LLM resources.
Category: Mistral Stars: 7,709 | Forks: 749

item.title: [Claude] everything-claude-code
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 75,008 → 76,105 (+1,097)
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
Language: JavaScript
Category: Claude Stars: 76,105 | Forks: 9,507

item.title: [AI] openclaw
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 311,182 → 313,424 (+2,242)
Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
Language: TypeScript
Category: AI Stars: 313,424 | Forks: 59,793
